allow: Bash(sed -i 's/new FetchResult\("https:\\/\\/example.com", html, FetchStatus.SUCCESS, null, 100\)/new FetchResult\(0, "https:\\/\\/example.com", html, FetchStatus.SUCCESS, null, 100\)/g' AnalyzeStageTest.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/new FetchResult\("https:\\/\\/example.com", "", FetchStatus.SUCCESS, null, 100\)/new FetchResult\(0, "https:\\/\\/example.com", "", FetchStatus.SUCCESS, null, 100\)/g' AnalyzeStageTest.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/new FetchResult\("https:\\/\\/example.com", null, FetchStatus.FETCH_TIMEOUT, "Timeout", 5000\)/new FetchResult\(0, "https:\\/\\/example.com", null, FetchStatus.FETCH_TIMEOUT, "Timeout", 5000\)/g' AnalyzeStageTest.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/new FetchResult\("https:\\/\\/example.com\\/" + i, html, FetchStatus.SUCCESS, null, 100\)/new FetchResult\(i, "https:\\/\\/example.com\\/" + i, html, FetchStatus.SUCCESS, null, 100\)/g' AnalyzeStageTest.java)

Bash(sed -i 's/new FetchResult\("https:\\/\\/example.com", htmlBuilder.toString\(\), FetchStatus.SUCCESS, null, 100\)/new FetchResult\(0, "https:\\/\\/example.com", htmlBuilder.toString\(\), FetchStatus.SUCCESS, null, 100\)/g' AnalyzeStageTest.java)
